title: Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game

"'''''Star Wars: Invasion of Theed'' Adventure Game'''" is a mini [[Roleplaying game]] that was released by [[Wizards of the Coast]] in 2000.

The adventures involve both established and original characters, and is set during the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] invasion and occupation of [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].

It is a boxed set that includes a mini rulebook, adventure booklet, character sheets, character tokens and an exclusive [[Hasbro]] action figure of [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]]. The game was meant to be a simplified introduction to the new [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] released for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']].

Wizards of the Coast also released a number of supplementary adventures that used the simplified ''Adventure Game'' ruleset, characters, enemies, and map tokens:
*''[[Peril in the Ionosphere]]''
*''[[The Predators]]''
*''[[The Smugglers of Naboo]]'' (A reprint of ''The Predators'')
*''[[A Night at Tosche Station]]''
*''[[Signal Interruption]]''
*''[[The Fall of Cloud City]]''
*''[[Battle in the Streets!]]''
